name: Swiss Cheese Strata
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch skillet over medium heat, brown the sausage, stirring to separate the meat. Spoon off any excess fat.
2. Butter a 13-by-9-inch baking dish. In a large bowl, combine the stuffing, cheese, broccoli and sausage. Arrange evenly in the prepared dish.
3. In the same baking dish, beat the eggs; stir in the broth and half-and-half. Pour over the stuffing mixture, covering all ingredients. Cover; refrigerate at least 6 hours or overnight. Let stand at room temperature for 1 hour before uncovering.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until set.
Makes 9 servings.
To prepare individual servings: Substitute eight 4-inch tart pans for the 13-by-9-inch baking dish.
